title: Better Animals - OFC
description: This pack completely revamps a huge variety of mobs
body:
![Better Animals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c32c660685210658fa6b5d50aaf3755e90622b62.png)

**🔥 OPTIFINE REQUIRED**
 
If you're tired of Minecraft’s default look and want something fresh, this texture pack is for you!

This pack completely revamps a huge variety of mobs — from friendly companions to hostile creatures — giving each one more personality, color, and visual appeal. Your world becomes more alive, expressive, and fun to explore!

✨ Every texture was carefully crafted to enhance immersion while staying true to Minecraft’s charm. Whether you're adventuring, building, or surviving the night, you'll notice the difference instantly.

🚀 Final version! Published on my new account Heycronus Dev, always marked with “- ofc” to distinguish from older versions.

**New Mobs Add texture:**

- 🐝 Bee
- 🐱 Cat
- 🐔 Chicken
- 🐶 Dog & Wolf
- 🐄 Cow
- 🐑 Sheep
- 🐖 Pig
- 🧟 Zombie
- 💚 Creeper
- 💀 Skeleton
- 🍄 Mooshroom
- 🦜 Parrot
- 🐇 Rabbit
- 🦑 Squid
- 🔥 Magma Cube
- 👻 Ghast
- 🛡️ Elder Guardian
- 🐐 Goat
- 🦊 Fox
- 🤖 Iron Golem
- 🐜 Silverfish
- 🐻 Bear
